instruction: Something in the Sydney release setup is stale. Review the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale model setting, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
canonical_instruction: I need the Sydney release setup cleaned up. Review the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale model setting, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
instruction_variants: Something's off in the Sydney release setup. Review the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale model setting, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

The Sydney release setup has something stale in it. Review the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale model setting, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

I need the Sydney release setup back in shape. Review the current model, the next-step task on the board, and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale model setting, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'Sydney refreshed release handoff notes.'
